verse.name: V1
verse.lines: As we gather in this place today, Holy Spirit, come and have Your way. Have Your way! As we lay aside our own desires, Sweep across our hearts with holy fire. Have Your way!

verse.name: C2
verse.lines: This is Your house, Your home, We welcome You. Lord, we welcome You. This is Your house, Your home, We welcome You today.

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: As we offer up our hearts and lives, Let them be a living sacrifice, Have Your way! Be glorified in everything we do; Be glorified in everything we say. Have Your way!

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: As we pray, Oh Lord, draw near It's Your voice, we long to hear.
